app.name: Ounje
app.description: Ounje helps people turn saved recipe links, food videos, meal photos, cravings, and fridge ingredients into meal prep plans, recipes, grocery lists, and provider checkout paths.
features: Import saved recipe videos, screenshots, links, captions, or meal photos.
Turn a craving or restaurant meal memory into a practical home-cooking direction.
Generate organized grocery lists and supported cart handoff paths from recipes or meal plans.
positioning: Food input first: saved TikTok recipe, restaurant meal, caption, fridge photo, or craving.
Ounje output second: cleaned-up recipe, meal prep plan, grocery list, or cart path.
Always remind readers to review ingredients, allergens, quantities, and substitutions themselves.
